name: Nicotinamide Riboside Augments the Aged Human Skeletal Muscle NAD+ Metabolome and Induces Transcriptomic and Anti-inflammatory Signatures
summary: A randomized placebo-controlled crossover trial testing whether nicotinamide riboside reaches aged human skeletal muscle and changes NAD metabolites, transcriptomic signatures, inflammatory cytokines, or mitochondrial bioenergetics.
